description_long: This is a vintage biplane with a striking purple and orange color scheme, featuring two large straight wings stacked vertically and supported by struts. The aircraft is equipped with twin piston engines mounted on the lower wing, each with a prominent propeller and exposed engine nacelles. The fuselage is boxy and robust, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit that appears to accommodate multiple crew members. The tail section consists of a conventional H-tail design with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels beneath the engines and a smaller tail wheel. Distinctive black crosses are visible on the wings and tail, suggesting a historical military origin.
description: A vintage twin-engine biplane with purple and orange livery, featuring stacked wings, fixed landing gear, and a conventional H-tail with twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin piston engines, propellers, fixed main landing gear, and the stacked biplane wings.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cockpit placement, wing struts, and the black cross insignia on the upper wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and the full span of the biplane wings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the tail section, engine nacelles, and the overall length of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, mid-mounted wings supported by struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the lower wing, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional H-tail with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed landing gear with two main wheels under the engines and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple seats, featuring a clear canopy and side windows.
